subcodes.first_line: Verily, when thou hearest My most sweet call and the shrill voice of My Most Exalted Pen, say: O people, the Lord of creation and its Sovereign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انک اذا سمعت ندائی الاحلی و صریر قلمی الاعلی قل یا قوم مولی الوری و مالک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
